Name: Backup Azure Database To Azure Storage
Description: Create a backup of SQL Azure Database and store it in Azure Blob Storage. Requires Azure PowerShell to be installed on Tentacle machine.

Parameters.Name: DatabaseServerName
Parameters.Label: Database Server Name
Parameters.HelpText: Azure SQL Server name, i.e. "d340fe8ok". Not a full name, just the machine name

Parameters.Name: DatabaseName
Parameters.Label: Database Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the database to be backed-up

Parameters.Name: DatabasePassword
Parameters.Label: Database Password
Parameters.HelpText: SQL Server Password to access the database

Parameters.Name: DatabaseUsername
Parameters.Label: Database Username
Parameters.HelpText: SQL Server Username to access the database

Parameters.Name: StorageName
Parameters.Label: Storage Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the storage account where the backup should go

Parameters.Name: StorageKey
Parameters.Label: Storage Key
Parameters.HelpText: Access key to the storage account

Parameters.Name: StorageContainerName
Parameters.Label: Storage Container Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the container where the backup should go
